name: Chest Close
description: a short wooden thud as a chest lid closes

ai.prompt: A heavy wooden chest lid closing: a solid deep wooden thud with an iron latch click and a short low resonance. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
